feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: EKBE-BUKRS not fetching value for delivery item.
entry.content:
We are upgrading our system from SAP S4 HANA 2021 version  to 2025 version. Now, table EKBE, has a field BUKRS(company code). But for some POs, which has delivery created, the BUKRS is not filled.

PO : 4522523339

entry.title: Unable to select data from the entries list
entry.content:
Regarding the issue where data cannot be selected from the entries List, I previously checked the related SAP Note and found that this issue is planned to be fixed in version 2606 or 2608.

In that case, what actions are required on our system side to resolve this issue? Do we need to take any additional steps, or will the issue be fixed automatically after the upgrade?

I would appreciate your guidance.

SAP Note reference: 3763555 - WEBGUI: History not working after Chrome / Edge 149 update - SAP for Me

entry.title: HANA Storage Issue
entry.content:
I have cleaned up the *** pointer data via transaction BD22 by removing all records from *** . The table volume has decreased from *** million entries to *** million entries.

When checking large tables and disk consumption via transaction DB02, the table size did not shrink immediately (I noticed the table size was reduced the next day).
However, the database disk usage overview still shows *** GB occupied with no reduction.
Is it safe to purge all data from table *** entirely?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: We are facing an issue while exporting data from the CJI3 report
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

We are facing an issue while exporting data from the CJI3 report.

Issue Description:

  • Transaction Code: CJI3
  • Selection Criteria:
    • Posting Date: 01.06.2026 to 30.06.2026
    • Projects: All Projects
  • The report executes successfully and the output screen is displayed.
  • However, when attempting to export/download the report output (Excel/Spreadsheet), the system throws an error and the data is not downloaded.

Expected Result: The report data should be exported successfully to Excel.

Actual Result: The system displays an error during export and the file is not downloaded.

entry.title: Customer Number Not Displayed for Certain Documents in FBL5N – Customer Line-Item Display
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

We are experiencing an issue in Transaction FBL5N (Customer Line Item Display) where the Customer Number field is not populated for a few accounting documents, although the documents are displayed under the respective customer account.

Observed Behavior

  • In FBL5N output, some line items show a blank Customer Number field.
  • Other line items for the same customer display the Customer Number correctly.
  • As shown in the attached file, customer numbers such as 902500 and 901400 are displayed for some records, while several other records belonging to the same customer appear with a blank Customer Number field.

entry.title: FBL1N mass block
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are trying to apply Payment block through FBL1N mass feature, but due to baseline date is not editable system is not allowing it.

 

Please find attached Document for detailed steps.

entry.title: Keine Beschreibungstexte in Transaktion KOH3
entry.content:
Hallo zusammen,

In der Transaktion KOH3 - Anzeige der Arbeitsgruppen - werden 99% der vorhandenen Beschreibungstexte nicht angezeigt.
Wenn ich mir den gleiche Inhalt über die Transaktion KOH2 anzeigen lasse,  werden diese wunderbar dargestellt.

Hat jemand das gleich Problem und konnte es bereits lösen?

Vielen Dank,
Bastian

entry.title: Supplying plant not appearing in ME32L
entry.content:
In ME32L , system not fetching the Supplying plant for the SAG number - 4300001385. I have checked all the configuration & master data which is valid.
Once again i have checked the ME31L , new creation for that system appear the supplying plant.
How can i reference the supplying plant determination ?
Need to solve this immediately.

entry.title: FIORI Apps are not opening in new tab
entry.content:
Hello Team,

When we click on a FIORI Tile / Apps, it does not open in new tab.

Please advice.

Thank you.

Regards,

Jerry

entry.title: PO is changeable after the GR is completed, we want to stop any change after GR
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

The system allows to change the qty and price of PO even after the GR is done. Which is causing issue in our business process and we want to stop any change after GR is done, unless the GR is reversed and then make any change.

The ABAP solution is suggested as below:

Implement a BADI check (recommended for selective control)

  • Enhancement ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST can be used to add custom logic.
  • In the implementation, read the PO item’s GR status (e.g. EKBE‑BWART = ‘101’ for goods receipt).
  • Raise a custom error message when a user attempts to change:
    • net price
    • quantity (or any other field that must be locked)
  • This approach blocks changes only after a GR, while still allowing normal edits before the receipt.

 

While the other is to make the qty and price field as displayed by screen layout, in this way we will be unable even to change the price or qty after the GR reversal. Hence not practicle.
Is there any standard solution to stop system from making any change after GR.
Regards

Masood

entry.title: CJ88 getting error- Not possible to post down payment clearing. There are no down payments
entry.content: Issue while doing CJ88 getting error- Not possible to post down payment clearing. There are no down payments

entry.title: GGB1 substitution not getting triggered during AS02
entry.content: The substitution rule for evaluation group is working fine in AS01 for asset master creation. But the same rule is not working for AS02 in case of change asset.

entry.title: FBL1N - Order Number selection criterion no longer filters vendor line items in S/4HANA
entry.content:
System:
- SAP S/4HANA
- Reference system: SAP ECC

Issue Description:
In transaction FBL1N, the selection field "Order Number" (N° ordre - field BKPF-LOTKZ or display structure  RFPOSXEXT-U_LOTKZ ) no longer appears to be taken into account in the S/4HANA environments.

When an Order Number is entered in the selection criteria, the report returns vendor line items that do not correspond to the entered Order Number. The output is therefore not filtered according to this criterion.

Expected Result:
The report should only display line items associated with the entered Order Number, as observed in the SAP ECC system.

Actual Result:
The report ignores the Order Number criterion and returns entries that are not restricted to the specified Order Number.

Comparison with ECC:
Using the same selection criteria on the SAP ECC system, the filtering is correctly applied and only the expected line items are returned.

Business Impact:
Users can no longer reliably analyze vendor open/cleared items based on Order Number. This impacts operational controls a

entry.title: GL Account name language issue in FBL1N line item
entry.content: Login SAP Production system in Chinese, go to FBL1N vendor line item, enter vendor 1300, company code 1000, other parameters keep default values and execute F8, you can see the name of GL account 2202010100 is English name instead of Chinese name, because we maintained GL account master name both in Chinese and English, suppose it should display English name of account,  high appreciated if someone tell me the reason why.

entry.title: Catalogs and Groups for FIORI Launchpad
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are currently using catalogs and groups design for FIORI launchpad in s/4HANA 2022 FP01. 

We are planning to upgrade to S/4HANA 2025 FPS01, and we are aware that SAP recommends moving to spaces and pages.

We would like to know if FIORI Launchpad in S/4HANA 2025 FPS01 will support the catalogs and groups layout? This is being asked to have an understanding of technical compatibilty so that we can plan for moving to spaces and pages before the upgrade or after the upgrade.

 

We have refered to this already -
https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/a7b390faab1140c087b8926571e942b7/46bfe098b96e4924a26d4b52449e8cb2.html

S- note: 3148424 - mentions support in S/4HANA 2023 but no information available about 2025

entry.title: Make Optional Check number field for F-36 transaction
entry.content: We want to make the check number field as optional for f-36 transaction . we have even checked note no 3531338  system says it cannot be implemented.

entry.title: Umschalten zwischen Spaces und Groups Launchpad - Parameter SPACES_ENABLE_USER
entry.content:
Wir bauen Schritt für Schritt unser Gruppen-Launchpad auf die neue Bereiche, Seiten und Abschnitte UI Sicht um. dabei wird beabsichtigt dem Nutzer selbst zu ermöglichen auf das neue Menü umzustellen, sofern es für seinen Bereich fertig gestellt wurde. Dazu möchten wir den Standard-Einstieg für den Benutzer auf dem Gruppenmenü belassen und dem Benutzer ermöglichen individuell auf das Bereichsmenü umzuschalten.

Die Parameter SPACES und SPACES_ENABLE_USER sitzen wie folgt:
SPACES = false
SPACES_ENABLE_USER = true

Erwartet würde von mir, das der Benutzer bei der ersten Anmeldung nach dem Setzen dieser Parameter auf seinem Launchpad im bisherigen und von uns gepflegten Gruppenmenü angemeldet wird und die Möglichkeit hat sich auf Wunsch auf Spaces und Pages umzustellen. Erst nach dieser individuellen Umstellung sollte dann für Folgeanmeldungen das Bereichsmenü direkt angezeigt werden.

Das Systemverhalten ist jedoch anders.
Das erste Anmelden ist abhängig von Usereinstellungen, die vor der Freigabe der Bereichsmenüs bereits vorliegen, hatte der Benutzer vor der true-Schaltung bereits mit Bereichen experimentiert, sieht er direkt Bereiche statt d

entry.title: Need SAP Note for S4 HANA similar to 1722312
entry.content: We are trying to update schedule line category in sales order from CN to CP via BAPI Sales order change, but when CP is updated the re- ATP check doesn't performs automatically. We found related problem SAP note below but this is only applicable for ECC version and out system is S4 HANA 2021 version- 1722312 - No order scheduling performed for BAPI SALESORDER CHANGE. Please advise suitable SAP Note for HANA version to implement the changes.

entry.title: Error Automatic Credit Memo - Advance Returns to Suppliers
entry.content:
When a return to suppliers is performed and a replacement material is received. The automatic Credit Note to close the process have an error: "M8080 Reversal Quantity greater that invoiced quantity to Date"

The Best Practice BMK, indicates that the Credit Memo is created automatically once the replacement material is received.

entry.title: sapui5 - updating the bootstrap to release 1.149 / 1.150
entry.content:
My apologies ahead of time, but I am looking for the note containing the TCI for those UI5 update(s).  I've looked at 3155948 - ABAP SAPUI5 patch version update, following the instructions under "Solution", but can not find any relevant note for the updates.  I've also searched other notes/documentation, but I still can't find a thing.

This request is because of a notification we received under SAP event ID:  EVB13291295

Thank you for your time.

Herman
